pages.title: Attensify — AI-Powered Digital Marketing Platform for Businesses
pages.markdown:

Platform

## AI-powered content, ads, SEO, blog & website — one platform.

Five specialist AI modules. Each one an expert. All working together.

### AI Content

Brief it. AI writes, schedules, and publishes.

Describe your campaign goal and Attensify's AI generates on-brand content for every channel — then auto-publishes on the optimal schedule.

- AI writes in your brand voice
- Auto-schedules for peak engagement
- Publishes to 15+ platforms simultaneously
- Per-post performance analytics

![Content calendar showing weekly social media schedule](https://attensify.net/_next/image?url=%2Fmockups%2Fcontent-calendar.png&w=3840&q=75)

### AI Ads

AI launches and optimizes campaigns for you.

Set your goal and budget. Attensify's AI builds the campaign, writes the copy, allocates spend across Google, Meta, and LinkedIn, and tunes ROAS in real time.

- AI-written ad copy & creatives
- Autonomous budget optimization
- Automated A/B testing at scale
- Real-time ROAS dashboard

![Ad campaigns dashboard with ROAS tracking](https://attensify.net/_next/image?url=%2Fmockups%2Fads-dashboard.png&w=3840&q=75)

### AI Blog

AI researches, writes, and ranks your articles.

Give Attensify a topic or keyword. It researches the SERP, writes an SEO-optimized long-form article, and publishes — ready to rank.

- AI-generated long-form articles
- Real-time SEO scoring (target: 90+)
- Auto-generated content briefs
- Reader engagement & ranking analytics

![Blog editor with SEO scoring and AI suggestions](https://attensify.net/_next/image?url=%2Fmockups%2Fblog-editor.png&w=3840&q=75)

### AI SEO

AI finds gaps and fixes them automatically.

Attensify continuously monitors your rankings, audits technical issues, analyses competitors, and surfaces the highest-impact actions to reach page 1.

- 500+ keyword rank tracking
- Automated technical site audits
- AI competitor gap analysis
- Backlink monitoring & alerts

![SEO audit report with performance scores](https://attensify.net/_next/image?url=%2Fmockups%2Fseo-audit.png&w=3840&q=75)

### AI Website

AI builds pages that convert.

Describe the page you need. Attensify's AI generates the layout, copy, and CTAs — then runs A/B tests and tracks Core Web Vitals to keep conversion rates climbing.

- AI-generated page layouts & copy
- Autonomous A/B testing
- Core Web Vitals monitoring
- Built-in form & CTA optimization

![Website builder with drag-and-drop interface](https://attensify.net/_next/image?url=%2Fmockups%2Fwebsite-builder.png&w=3840&q=75)

## Let AI handle your marketing. You focus on growth.

Join 67+ businesses already using Attensify to run marketing on autopilot. Free plan available.

[Start Free](https://app.attensify.net/auth/signup)

Creator Program

## Unlock a new acquisition channel — for free

We recruit micro-influencers who promote your brand to their engaged audiences. You only pay when they deliver results — commission per sale, zero upfront cost.

![Creator filming a product review](https://attensify.net/_next/image?url=%2Favatars%2Fcreator-1.png&w=1200&q=75)![Creator filming an unboxing video](https://attensify.net/_next/image?url=%2Favatars%2Fcreator-2.png&w=1200&q=75)

#### Performance-based, not impression-based

Pay only when creators deliver paying customers. No wasted ad spend on vanity metrics.

#### Access 50+ vetted micro-influencers

Our creators have under 50K followers but 2-3x higher engagement rates than mega-influencers.

#### Track every dollar in real-time

Full attribution dashboard showing which creators drive signups, conversions, and revenue.

#### Zero management overhead

We handle creator recruitment, onboarding, content kits, and payouts. You just watch the leads come in.

How it works for your business

01

#### We recruit creators in your niche

Our team finds and vets micro-influencers whose audiences match your ideal customer profile.

02

#### Creators promote authentically

They share genuine reviews, tutorials, and use-cases — not scripted ads. Trust converts better.

03

#### You pay only for results

Commission is deducted only when a referred user becomes a paying customer. Pure performance.

50+

Active creators

2.1x

Avg creator ROAS

$0

Upfront cost

[Activate Creator Channel](https://app.attensify.net/auth/signup) [Are you a creator? Apply here](https://attensify.net/creators)

## How SMBs and agencies automate digital marketing with AI

Real results. Across every industry.

E-commerceSaaSAgencyConsulting

![E-commerce brand](https://attensify.net/_next/image?url=%2Fmockups%2Fcase-ecommerce.png&w=1200&q=75)

E-commerceE-commerce brand

### An online store doubled orders with unified content & ad campaigns

By connecting their content calendar directly to ad campaigns, this e-commerce team cut marketing overhead by 35% and significantly grew online orders.

pages.title: Pricing — AI Marketing Platform Plans | Attensify
pages.markdown:
Pricing

# AI Marketing Platform Pricing — Plans for SMBs and Agencies

Start free. Upgrade when you need more. No contracts, no hidden fees — just AI marketing that works.

Free plan, no expiry No credit card required Cancel any time

Starter

Free

For solo founders getting started

- 1 website
- 3 social channels
- 50 AI-generated posts/mo
- Basic analytics dashboard
- Content calendar
- Community support

[Get started free](https://app.attensify.net/auth/signup)

Most popular

Growth

$49/mo

For growing businesses scaling up

- 5 websites
- 15 social channels
- Unlimited AI posts
- Ads management (Google, Meta, LinkedIn)
- SEO audit & rank tracking
- AI blog writing tool
- Team collaboration (5 seats)
- Priority support
- Custom reports

[Start Growth plan](https://app.attensify.net/auth/signup?plan=growth)

Scale

$129/mo

For agencies & enterprise teams

- Unlimited everything
- White-label reports
- API access
- Custom integrations
- SSO & RBAC
- Dedicated account manager
- SLA guarantee
- Onboarding concierge
- Multi-client dashboard

[Start Scale plan](https://app.attensify.net/auth/signup?plan=scale)

## Full plan comparison

| Feature | Starter | Growth | Scale |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Websites | 1 | 5 | Unlimited |
| Social channels | 3 | 15 | Unlimited |
| AI posts/month | 50 | Unlimited | Unlimited |
| Ads management | — | ✓ | ✓ |
| SEO tools | — | ✓ | ✓ |
| AI blog writing | — | ✓ | ✓ |
| Team seats | 1 | 5 | Unlimited |
| White-label reports | — | — | ✓ |
| API access | — | — | ✓ |
| Dedicated account manager | — | — | ✓ |
| SLA guarantee | — | — | ✓ |

## Frequently asked questions about Attensify pricing

### Is there a free plan?

Yes. The Starter plan is free forever — no expiry, no credit card required. Includes 50 AI-generated posts per month and 3 social channels.

### Can I cancel at any time?

Yes. All plans are month-to-month with no long-term commitment. Cancel or downgrade any time from your account settings.

### What platforms does Attensify publish to?

Instagram, LinkedIn, Twitter/X, Facebook, TikTok, Pinterest, YouTube, and Threads — plus Google Ads, Meta Ads, and LinkedIn Ads.

### Is Attensify suitable for marketing agencies?

Yes. The Scale plan was designed for agencies: white-label reports, multi-client management, API access, SSO, and a dedicated account manager.

### Do you offer annual billing?

Yes — annual billing is available at a discount. Contact us or select annual during checkout.

### How quickly can I get started?

Connect your social accounts and you're live in 15 minutes. The AI learns your brand voice from your existing content.

## Ready to grow with AI marketing?

Join 67+ businesses using Attensify to automate content, ads, SEO, and more. Start free — no credit card required.

[Start for free](https://app.attensify.net/auth/signup)

pages.title: Creator Programme — Earn While You Grow | Attensify
pages.markdown:
# Turn your audience into  recurring income

Get a free Attensify account, promote products and platforms from top brands to your audience, and earn **30% recurring commission** on every sale. No minimum followers. No upfront cost.

[Apply to Join](https://attensify.net/creators#apply) [Learn More](https://attensify.net/creators#how-it-works)

How it works

## Three steps to start earning

It takes less than 5 minutes to get started.

01

### Sign Up & Get Approved

Fill out the form with your social profiles. We review and approve within 24 hours. You get instant access to a free Growth plan account and your unique referral link.

Free Growth account

02

### Create & Share Content

Use our ready-made content kit — reel scripts, carousels, captions, and stories. Or create your own authentic content. Share your referral link across all channels.

24 ready-made assets

03

### Earn Recurring Commission

Every time someone subscribes through your link, you earn 30% commission — recurring monthly for as long as they stay subscribed. Paid via UPI every month.

30% lifetime commission

What you get

## Everything you need to earn

We set you up for success with tools, content, and tracking — so you can focus on creating.

### Ready-Made Content Kit

Create content in minutes, not hours

We give you everything — reel scripts, carousel templates, LinkedIn posts, YouTube short scripts, and Instagram stories. All branded, all customizable, all designed to convert.

- 24+ ready-to-post content pieces
- Platform-specific templates
- Customizable brand assets
- New content added every week

### Transparent Payouts

See every rupee you earn, in real-time

Track your earnings from click to conversion. Every payout is visible in your dashboard, processed monthly via UPI or bank transfer. No minimums, no surprises.

- No minimum payout threshold
- UPI / bank transfer on the 1st
- Full commission breakdown per referral
- Lifetime earning history

Benefits

## Why creators love this programme

### Free Growth Account

Full access to the Attensify Growth plan worth $49/mo — completely free while you're an active creator.

### 30% Recurring Commission

Earn 30% on every paying customer you refer — for the entire lifetime of their subscription. No caps ever.

### Ready-Made Content Kit

Branded reels scripts, carousels, captions, stories — all customizable and ready to post in minutes.

### Real-Time Analytics

Track every click, signup, and conversion from your personal creator dashboard in real-time.

### Monthly Payouts via UPI

Paid monthly via bank transfer or UPI. No minimum threshold, no hidden fees, no waiting.

### Dedicated Success Manager

Your own creator success manager helps you maximize earnings with personalized growth strategies.

Earning potential

## What you could earn

Based on real creator conversion rates. These are recurring — they compound every month.

[Start earning today](https://attensify.net/creators#apply)

Success stories

## Hear from our creators

₹1.2L/mo

“I made ₹1.2L in my first month promoting Attensify. The product basically sells itself once you show people the dashboard.”

KR

Kavya Reddy

@kavyacreates · 12K on Instagram

₹2.8L/mo

“The 30% recurring commission is unreal. I referred 40 businesses and now I earn passive income every single month without doing anything.”

RD

Rohan Desai

@rohandigital · 28K on YouTube

₹45K/mo

“Even with a small audience, the conversion rate is amazing because Attensify genuinely solves a pain point every business owner understands.”

AK

Aisha Khan

@aisha.marketing · 8K on LinkedIn

FAQ

## Frequently asked questions

Who can join the Creator Programme?
+

Any content creator, marketer, or digital professional with under 50K followers on any platform. We look for authentic engagement over raw follower count.

How much can I realistically earn?
+

You earn 30% recurring commission on every paying subscriber you refer. With plans starting at $49/mo, each referral earns you ~$15/mo indefinitely. Active creators with 10K+ audiences typically earn ₹50K–₹3L per month.

How and when do I get paid?
+

Monthly payouts via bank transfer or UPI, processed on the 1st of every month. No minimum threshold — even if you earn ₹500, it gets paid out.

Do I need marketing experience?
+

Not at all. We provide ready-made content, video scripts, and creative assets. If your audience includes business owners, freelancers, or marketers — you're a perfect fit.

What happens after I apply?
+

We review your profile within 24 hours. Once approved, you get instant access to your free Growth account, unique referral link, and the full content kit.

## Apply to join the Creator Programme

Fill in your details below. We'll review your profile and get back to you within 24 hours.

Primary platformInstagramYouTubeLinkedInX / TwitterTikTokOther

Submit Application

By applying, you agree to our terms. We'll only contact you about the Creator Programme.

[Apply Now](https://attensify.net/creators#apply)

## Frequently asked questions about Attensify pricing

### Is there a free plan?

Yes. The Starter plan is free forever — no expiry, no credit card required. Includes 50 AI-generated posts per month and 3 social channels.

### Can I cancel at any time?

Yes. All plans are month-to-month with no long-term commitment. Cancel or downgrade any time from your account settings.

### What platforms does Attensify publish to?

Instagram, LinkedIn, Twitter/X, Facebook, TikTok, Pinterest, YouTube, and Threads — plus Google Ads, Meta Ads, and LinkedIn Ads.

### Is Attensify suitable for marketing agencies?

Yes. The Scale plan was designed for agencies: white-label reports, multi-client management, API access, SSO, and a dedicated account manager.

### Do you offer annual billing?

Yes — annual billing is available at a discount. Contact us or select annual during checkout.

### How quickly can I get started?

Connect your social accounts and you're live in 15 minutes. The AI learns your brand voice from your existing content.

FAQ

## Frequently asked questions

Who can join the Creator Programme?
+

Any content creator, marketer, or digital professional with under 50K followers on any platform. We look for authentic engagement over raw follower count.

How much can I realistically earn?
+

You earn 30% recurring commission on every paying subscriber you refer. With plans starting at $49/mo, each referral earns you ~$15/mo indefinitely. Active creators with 10K+ audiences typically earn ₹50K–₹3L per month.

How and when do I get paid?
+

Monthly payouts via bank transfer or UPI, processed on the 1st of every month. No minimum threshold — even if you earn ₹500, it gets paid out.

Do I need marketing experience?
+

Not at all. We provide ready-made content, video scripts, and creative assets. If your audience includes business owners, freelancers, or marketers — you're a perfect fit.

What happens after I apply?
+

We review your profile within 24 hours. Once approved, you get instant access to your free Growth account, unique referral link, and the full content kit.
